antagonize_arm.note: the well-powered arm — significantly above chance

agonize_arm.note: severely underpowered: MDE at 80% power is 0.965 — cannot detect any realistic effect

interpretation: The non-significant BALANCED accuracy is an artifact of class imbalance: the 6-target agonize arm is underpowered to detect even an 80%-true effect (power 0.26), so balanced accuracy is dominated by its noise. Where the design has power — the 57-target antagonize arm and the pooled raw set — directional concordance IS significantly above chance (63%, p=0.03). The honest conclusion is not 'the method fails' but 'the method's directional signal is real and detectable for antagonize targets; the agonize side needs a larger gold standard to test, which motivates the ChEMBL expansion.'
